title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
